title: Verify Loss Aversion warning appears when user attempts to cancel trial
description: Test that clicking Cancel triggers the Loss Aversion Exit Gate with warning about losing remaining free days
preconditions: User is on Trial Corner Hub
expected_result: Popup displays 'Wait! Don't lose your free days' headline with body text explaining immediate access loss, with 'Keep Trial & Set Reminder' as primary action and 'Cancel Anyway' as secondary action
